headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) And The Rest Of The Dental Equipment & Technology Stocks
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) and the rest of the dental equipment & technology stocks fared in Q1.
